THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOODS, JOYCE AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM-SHAQUILLE WOODS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KONG, TAT-CHUEN $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,080.00, THE COURT ON ITS OWN MOTION AMENDS PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TO APPOINT JOYCE WOODS AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR SHAQUILLE WOODS, A MINOR.
